title: Articles
description: A synthesized, personalized news article shown in the user's feed.

summary.description: one-paragraph deck shown in the feed list

tags.description: topic tag strings — feed filtering and the /tag route

imageUrl.description: optional hero image URL surfaced in the feed card (from a cited item)

score.description: personalization relevance rank; higher = surfaced first

read.description: whether the user has opened it

saved.description: whether the user bookmarked it for later

pinned.description: whether the curator pinned this to the top of the feed and every digest

editorNote.description: optional curator annotation shown on the article card

clusterKey.description: normalized grouping key so near-duplicate articles collapse in digests

createdAt.description: when the article entered the feed

citations.description: the raw items this article was synthesized from

research.description: deep-dive reports requested on this article
